rationale: Empirical lens, every gate green and the two round-1 hard_blocks are ADDRESSED with running proof. (R6, THE critical one): go test -count=1 ./internal/validate/... PASSES; TestMoverRunStateAndVestigials_ProcessArtifacts RUNS and PASSES. I independently simulated the R6 gate with a temp _test.go: the 4 previously-failing paths (.mindspec/lineage/manifest.json, .mindspec/migrations/bead5-flatten/{lineage,state}.json, .mindspec/policies.yml) now isProcessArtifact()==true AND isSourceFile()==false, so Bead 5's complete clears adr-divergence-unowned. No over-match: isMoverRunState/isVestigialConfigDrop are scoped to distinct dirs (.mindspec/lineage|migrations/) + two exact paths; they do NOT sweep .mindspec/domains/OWNERSHIP.yaml, .mindspec/adr/*.md, spec.md, config.yaml, policies-v2.yml. Temp file removed, worktree clean. (R5): BENCH-MOVED.md both links repointed to .mindspec/adr/; both targets exist (test -f). Repo-wide markdown scan = 33 hits, ALL under docs_archive/ (frozen), ZERO live broken links outside. go build + go vet clean; gofmt -l empty. Diff is exactly the 4 files; no source corruption; workflow architecture.md doc-sync note accurately documents the matcher extension.

findings.issue: TestMoverRunStateAndVestigials_ProcessArtifacts RUNS+PASSES. Independent temp _test.go confirmed the 4 previously-failing paths (.mindspec/lineage/manifest.json, .mindspec/migrations/bead5-flatten/{lineage,state}.json, .mindspec/policies.yml) classify isProcessArtifact()==true and isSourceFile()==false. This is the property that lets Bead 5 complete pass adr-divergence. Temp test removed; git status clean.

isMoverRunState scoped to .mindspec/lineage/ + .mindspec/migrations/ prefixes; isVestigialConfigDrop to two exact paths. Empirically verified NOT to match .mindspec/domains/workflow/OWNERSHIP.yaml, .mindspec/adr/ADR-0027*.md, .mindspec/specs/106*/spec.md, .mindspec/config.yaml, .mindspec/policies-v2.yml. No real .mindspec-rooted source excluded from the gate.

BENCH-MOVED.md both ADR links repointed from .mindspec/docs/adr/ to .mindspec/adr/; both targets (.mindspec/adr/ADR-0027-mindspec-otel-only.md, ADR-0028-bench-rescue-procedure.md) exist via test -f. Repo-wide grep ']( .mindspec/docs/ | docs/ | review/' over *.md = 33 hits, ALL under docs_archive/ (frozen); ZERO live broken links outside the archive.

go build ./... exit 0; go vet ./... exit 0; gofmt -l . empty (0, even incl. docs_archive); go test -count=1 ./internal/validate/... PASS (~30s). harness intentionally not run (CI-red TestLayoutPackageIsOwned fixtures are documented Bead-6 deferral).

Round-2 diff is exactly the 4 declared files (BENCH-MOVED.md, divergence.go, layout_classifier_test.go, workflow/architecture.md). The only .go source change is the additive divergence.go matchers; its doc-sync counterpart note in workflow/architecture.md is present and accurate. The round-1 move is undisturbed; no new issue.
